◎简　　介  

　　Richard Sharpe is a scrappy Sergeant with the second Battalion of the 95th Rifles. After bravely saving the life of the Sir Arthur Wellesley (the future Duke of Wellington), Sharpe is rewarded with a field commission, making him a lieutenant.  In command of the 95th Rifles under Captain Murray, Sharpe soon finds that they are an undisciplined bunch.  Neither Murray nor the men ...
